summary:
Claim: Midpalatal split following Le-Fort I osteotomy enables transverse movement of the maxilla.  
Evidence: - It separates the bilateral palatine plates, creating space for lateral expansion. - Allows controlled transverse widening of the maxillary arch.  
Answer: D: Transverse  

(498 tokens)
